Order Your Signicade A-Frame Signs with Professional Design Templates

The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit provides the ultimate outdoor advertising solution for businesses, featuring durable hardware and two vibrant 36" x 24" full-color signs. This weather-resistant, maintenance-free plastic A-frame delivers maximum stability for sidewalk advertising and business promotion.

Each kit includes molded handles for easy transport, making setup and relocation effortless for daily business use. The double-sided design maximizes visibility from both directions, perfect for storefronts, restaurants, retail locations, and special events.

Choose from hundreds of professionally designed templates or upload your own artwork. Our high-resolution digital printing on 4mm Coroplast material ensures vibrant colors that withstand outdoor conditions. The lightweight yet durable construction makes these A-frame signs ideal for businesses that need portable, professional advertising displays.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast Material for Signicade A-Frame Outdoor Durability

Your Signicade Deluxe A-Frame kit includes premium hardware and two 36" x 24" signs printed on professional-grade materials designed for outdoor business advertising.

4mm Coroplast Signs

Our lightweight 4mm Coroplast material offers superior waterproof protection and exceptional durability for outdoor A-frame applications. This plastic substrate provides vibrant digital printing results while maintaining structural integrity in various weather conditions.

Key material benefits include:

  • Completely waterproof construction
  • Lightweight for easy handling and transport
  • Digitally printed with UV-resistant inks
  • Maintains color vibrancy in outdoor conditions
  • Easy to clean and maintain

Request a free sample packet of materials to evaluate quality before ordering.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Assembly & Hardware Features for Signicade A-Frame Installation

The Signicade Deluxe A-Frame system is designed for professional business use with user-friendly features that ensure reliable outdoor performance.

Hardware Features

  • Durable black plastic A-frame construction
  • Molded carrying handles for easy transport
  • Secure sign mounting system
  • Weather-resistant materials
  • Stable base design for windy conditions

Assembly & Setup

Your A-frame arrives ready to use with simple assembly. The intuitive design allows quick sign changes when you need to update your messaging. The stable base and secure mounting system ensure your signs stay in place during normal outdoor conditions.

Maintenance-Free Design

The plastic construction requires no painting or special maintenance. Simply wipe clean with standard cleaning solutions to maintain professional appearance.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Signicade A-Frame Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production timeframes to meet your business advertising deadlines. Choose from express, standard, or economy production times based on your specific needs.

2 Business Days Express

Ideal for urgent business promotions and last-minute advertising campaigns.

  • Perfect for time-sensitive retail promotions
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the next business day
  • Emergency same-day options available - contact customer service
  • Turnaround begins once file upload is complete

3 Business Days Standard (Most Popular)

Our most popular option balances speed with value for routine business signage needs.

  • FREE production upgrade - no additional charges
  • Ideal for regular business advertising updates
  • Sufficient time for quality control review
  • Perfect for planned promotional campaigns

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option for businesses planning ahead with their advertising needs.

  • Maximum savings for budget-conscious businesses
  • Allows additional time for proof reviews
  • Ideal for businesses with flexible advertising timelines

Important Notes:

  • Production time starts when artwork is approved and files are complete
  • Proof requests will pause production until approval is received
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Methods for Signicade A-Frame Sign Orders

All Signicade Deluxe A-Frame orders require payment before production begins to ensure timely processing of your business advertising signs.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received and cleared before production

Payment Processing

Your credit card will not be charged until you have approved your order and artwork. This ensures you have full control over your final A-frame sign design before payment processing.

Check Payment Information

Business customers paying by check should allow additional time for check processing and clearance before production begins. Learn more about our check payment process.

Order Security

All payment information is processed through secure, encrypted systems to protect your business financial data. We never store complete credit card information on our servers.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Signicade A-Frame Kit Delivery

We offer multiple shipping options to meet your business timeline requirements. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 with any shipping questions before placing your order.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 Business Days
  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 Business Days
  • Three Day Express: 3 Business Days
  • Two Day Express: 2 Business Days
  • Overnight Express: 1 Business Day

Shipping Cost Factors

Shipping prices are calculated based on package weight and destination. The Signicade A-Frame kit requires special packaging due to hardware components, which may affect shipping costs.

Tracking & Delivery

You will receive tracking information once your A-frame kit ships. All shipping company terms apply for delivery timing and potential delays due to weather or circumstances beyond our control.

Economy Shipping Notes

When selecting economy shipping, include complete address details including P.O. Box information in the "Address Two" field during checkout to ensure successful delivery.

International Shipping

International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact customer service for detailed international shipping requirements.

Damage or Loss Protection

If your A-frame kit arrives damaged, return the damaged items for replacement. Lost packages are replaced after the shipping company confirms loss, typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Applications for Signicade A-Frame Sidewalk Signs

Signicade A-Frame signs provide versatile outdoor advertising solutions for businesses across multiple industries. The portable design and professional appearance make them ideal for various commercial applications.

Retail & Restaurant Applications

  • Daily specials and menu promotions
  • Sales announcements and special offers
  • Store hours and contact information
  • Seasonal promotions and holiday sales
  • New product launches and arrivals

Professional Services

  • Office hours and contact information
  • Service promotions and special rates
  • Open house announcements
  • Professional consultations and appointments
  • Business relocations and updates

Event & Temporary Signage

  • Trade show booth identification
  • Farmers market and outdoor vendor displays
  • Real estate open house directional signs
  • Construction and business announcements
  • Community events and fundraisers

Directional & Informational Use

  • Parking directions and instructions
  • Building entrance identification
  • Safety notices and guidelines
  • Temporary business location changes
  • Customer flow management

Advantages for Business Owners

  • Easy message updates without reprinting
  • Weather-resistant outdoor durability
  • Portable design for flexible placement
  • Professional appearance enhances brand image
  • Cost-effective advertising with long-term use
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Signicade A-Frame Sign Production

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal printing results for your Signicade A-Frame signs. Our professional design team can assist with file preparation or provide complete design services.

Preferred File Formats

Vector-based files produce the highest quality results for A-frame sign printing:

  • .EPS files: Convert all fonts to outlines before submission
  • .PDF files: High-resolution with embedded fonts
  • .JPG files: Minimum 300 DPI at actual print size
  • .TIFF files: High-resolution with proper color profiles

Artwork Specifications

  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for optimal print quality
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.125" bleed on all sides
  • Safety Zone: Keep important text 0.25" from edges
  • File Size: Maximum 60 MB for online upload

Design Considerations

  • Use bold, readable fonts for sidewalk visibility
  • Ensure adequate contrast between text and background
  • Consider viewing distance when sizing text elements
  • Design for both sides if using double-sided display
  • Account for A-frame mounting area in design layout

Professional Design Services

Our experienced graphic designers can create custom artwork for your Signicade A-Frame signs. Simply provide your content, branding elements, and specific requirements during the ordering process.

Order Proofs Available

Request an order proof to review your design, pricing, and order details before production. Proof requests will pause production until you provide approval, ensuring complete satisfaction with your A-frame signs.

Color Matching Services

For brand-critical applications requiring precise color matching, our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color reproduction. Contact customer service for color matching requirements and additional details.

For files larger than 60 MB or technical questions about artwork preparation, contact our design team for personalized assistance and fast service recommendations.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Signicade A-Frame Signs Today

Ready to enhance your business visibility with professional Signicade A-Frame signs? Our complete kit includes durable hardware and two custom 36" x 24" signs designed for outdoor advertising success.

Why Choose Our Signicade A-Frame Solution

  • Complete Kit: Hardware and two custom signs included
  • Professional Quality: Weather-resistant materials and UV-resistant printing
  • Fast Turnaround: Express production options available
  • Design Flexibility: Choose templates or upload custom artwork
  • Portable Design: Easy setup and relocation for daily use

Perfect for Your Business Needs

Whether you're promoting daily specials, announcing sales events, or providing directional information, the Signicade A-Frame system delivers professional results that attract customers and enhance your business presence.

Our experienced customer service team includes graphic designers ready to help with artwork questions, design requirements, and technical specifications. Contact us at (320) 391-5300 for personalized assistance with your A-frame sign project.

Get Started in Three Easy Steps

  1. Select your production timeline and design option
  2. Upload your artwork or choose from professional templates
  3. Review and approve your order for production

Start creating your custom Signicade A-Frame signs today and give your business the professional outdoor advertising presence it deserves.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Signicade A-Frame Signs

What's included with the Signicade A-Frame kit?

Each kit includes one Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame hardware unit and two custom-printed 36" x 24" signs made from 4mm Coroplast material. The hardware features molded handles for easy transport and a stable base design.

Can I order replacement signs for my existing A-frame?

Yes, we offer replacement signs for existing Signicade A-Frame hardware. The signs are designed to fit standard Signicade hardware and can be ordered separately when you need to update your messaging.

How weather-resistant are the A-frame signs?

The 4mm Coroplast material is completely waterproof and designed for outdoor use. The UV-resistant printing maintains color vibrancy even with extended sun exposure. The plastic A-frame hardware is also weather-resistant and maintenance-free.

What file formats do you accept for custom artwork?

We accept .EPS, .PDF, .JPG, and .TIFF files. Vector-based formats like .EPS with outlined fonts produce the best results. Files should be high-resolution (300 DPI minimum) and no larger than 60 MB for online upload.

How long does production take?

We offer multiple production options: 2-day express, 3-day standard (most popular), and 5-day saver. Production time starts when your artwork is approved and files are finalized. Additional time may be needed if you request a proof review.

Can you design the signs for me?

Yes, our professional design team can create custom artwork for your A-frame signs. Choose the "Let us design" option and provide your content, branding requirements, and specific instructions. You'll receive a proof for approval before production.

What's the difference between templates and custom design?

Templates offer pre-designed layouts that you can customize with your text and images. Custom design service means our designers create artwork from scratch based on your specifications. Both options produce high-quality results.

Do you offer color matching services?

Yes, we provide a Color Match Proof System for projects requiring precise color reproduction. This service is ideal for maintaining brand color consistency. Contact customer service for color matching requirements and pricing.

How much do A-frame signs weigh?

The complete kit is lightweight and portable, designed for easy daily setup and storage. The Coroplast signs are particularly lightweight while maintaining durability, and the plastic A-frame hardware includes molded handles for comfortable carrying.

Can I use the A-frame indoors?

Absolutely. While designed for outdoor durability, Signicade A-Frame signs work excellently indoors for retail displays, trade shows, office environments, and any situation requiring portable, professional signage.

What if my signs arrive damaged?

If your A-frame kit arrives damaged during shipping, contact us immediately. We'll arrange for return of damaged items and send replacements. Keep all packaging materials and document any damage for the fastest resolution.

Do you ship internationally?

Yes, but international customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact our customer service team for specific international shipping requirements.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
